channel.title: Daily Feed (Last 48 Hours, Updated 9 AM BD)
channel.description: Daily Feed (Last 48 Hours, Updated 9 AM BD) generated by script

item.title: The Economic Magic of Equal Opportunities for Women
item.description: None of the 190 countries covered by the World Bank’s Women, Business, and the Law 2026 report provides women with the same legal environment as men, with the biggest gaps found in safety, entrepreneurship, and childcare. In developing economies, the costs in terms of growth and employment are considerable.
